subject: Ivanka Trump heads to Georgia
body:
Yesterday, Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump traveled to Duluth, Georgia, visiting the UPS Integrad facility near Atlanta. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e328e7410&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 21, 2019
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Trump heads to Georgia**

**Yesterday,** Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump traveled to Duluth, Georgia, visiting the UPS Integrad facility near Atlanta alongside Gov. Brian Kemp (R-GA). This state-of-the-art training center gives UPS drivers the chance to learn valuable skills crucial for success in the rapidly changing global economy.

**Her visit marked an opportunity** to discuss UPS’ workforce development programs, which parallel the Trump Administration’s recent push to get more American jobs filled by American workers. With nine UPS Integrad facilities in United States, the result has been lower turnover and fewer accidents among the company’s new drivers.

**“This is something** that the Administration is deeply passionate about—ensuring that all Americans have the opportunity to benefit from the booming economy that we are experiencing,” [Ms. Trump said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ad99575d5&e=3ee4985eea) at a roundtable with UPS employees.

**Last July,** President Donald J. Trump encouraged top executives across the country to sign his Pledge to America’s Workers, intended to give employees and students alike the chance to secure better, more stable jobs. UPS was on board from the start, committing to offer 51,750 career opportunities through skills training and apprenticeship programs.

**With Ivanka Trump leading** the charge, the Pledge to America’s Workers has grown to more than 6.5 million opportunities pledged for our workforce since last July. That number climbs each day, with partners that include Walmart, Apple, FedEx, and large and small businesses from coast to coast.

[See the pledge: More than 6.5 million opportunities for America’s workers.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da9b163cd1&e=3ee4985eea)

**In photos** : [Ivanka Trump visits UPS Integrad in Georgia](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fbf431bd79&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Vice President Pence to Europe: America is leading once again**

**From Poland to Germany,** Vice President Mike Pence represented America on the world stage last week in a series of meetings with global leaders.

**In Poland,** the Vice President and Second Lady Karen Pence paid their respects to victims of anti-Semitism at Auschwitz and Birkenau, the scenes of unspeakable tragedy during the Holocaust. They were joined by Polish President Andrzej Duda and First Lady Agata Kornhauser-Duda. “May Auschwitz be a reminder to all people and all times that to fall silent in the face of evil is to ensure its triumph,” the Vice President shared on Twitter.

**At the 55th Annual Munich Security Conference** , Vice President Pence explained how America is leading once again on the world stage. “With the support of strong bipartisan majorities in the United States Congress, President Trump has taken decisive action to make the strongest military in the history of the world stronger still, enacting the largest investment in our national defense since the days of Ronald Reagan,” he said.

**With America’s renewed strength,** President Trump has urged our NATO allies to live up to their commitments toward our common defense. His call to action worked: The number of NATO members spending at least 2 percent of their GDP on defense has doubled in just the past two years.

[Vice President Pence: “We will deal with the world as it is, not as we wish it to be.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ffaf3a4d5&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:** [The Vice President and Second Lady visit Auschwitz and Birkenau](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ef6e365cd&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Meeting this mark would send an unmistakable message about the strength of our movement:
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=596%2E150750%2Ei2LF5-)

Since Tuesday's announcement, I am proud to report that more than 600,000 people have signed up to join our campaign.
Let me be very clear: no single person can address the enormous challenges our country faces. That’s something we can only do together, which is why we are putting together an unprecedented grassroots campaign of one million people.
The powerful special interests that dominate our economic and political life may have unlimited amounts of money for campaign contributions and lobbying, but we have something they don't have. We have people power. That is our strength and that is why, together, we will win the Democratic nomination, the general election and begin the process of transforming our country.
We’re off to a great start, but we still have a little ways to go. Meeting the one million mark would send an unmistakable message about the strength of our movement, so I’m asking you directly:
[**Can I count on you to add your name to say you support our campaign for president?**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_bern_message/?source=em190220-3-v2-full-120&t=27&akid=596%2E150750%2Ei2LF5-)
This is a pivotal moment for our country and our democracy, and it means a lot to know we are in this fight together.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**We’re counting on one million people to say they support our campaign, and we’re not quite there yet.**

**Add your name today to join our campaign.**

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_bern_message/?source=em190220-3-v2-full-120&t=29&akid=596%2E150750%2Ei2LF5-)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to, [unsubscribe using this link](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=596%2E150750%2Ei2LF5-). But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=596_150750_i2LF5-&akid=596%2E150750%2Ei2LF5-).

name: Kirsten
subject: re: a Green New Deal (and a photo of my boys)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
why I support a Green New Deal:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0f0/3529210483/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0f0/3529210483/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter, we need to take transformative action to save our planet from climate change, and we need to act now. I'm running for president to fight for a Green New Deal.
Staving off disaster requires bold action to break the fossil fuel industry's stranglehold on our politics. We need to embrace clean energy and create green jobs--it's our only hope for a sustainable future for our children. We can't accept a future where Earth becomes unlivable--we have to fight to protect it, like I've done in the Senate and like I'll do as president. I will put our air and water and the health of our families at the top of my agenda--I'll fight for it from day one.
**Peter, this is our moonshot. We have to confront the corporate greed and toxic lobbyist culture that 's put us on the brink of no return. And we know what it'll take to succeed: coming together and fighting back. That's why I need to hear that you're in. We need 1,500 supporters to join our planet-saving movement to transform our economy and protect the only home we've ever known. Will you sign our petition right now to call for a Green New Deal?**
**[Add your name right now to demand a Green New Deal--not just for us, but for our children and their children. ](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0f3/3529210483/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3OTYtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/GND-petition?source=jtk2796-ja-gfp-nd")**
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0f3/3529210483/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3OTYtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/GND-petition?source=jtk2796-ja-gfp-nd")
Here's what's coming if we don't protect our planet: critical food and water shortages, stronger and more frequent wildfires and major storms, and an increasing number of climate refugees who will be forced to leave their homes.
That's just a couple short decades away. My boys, Henry and Theo, will be in the prime of their lives, making decisions for themselves and their families, uncertain if the planet's in good enough shape to support their plans and dreams for the future.
It breaks my heart, and quite honestly, it makes me angry. The scientific consensus is clear: The planet is warming, and humans have made it worse. Yet the greed of polluters who put their bottom lines over our collective well-being has stymied action. Our current president pulled out of the landmark Paris climate accord, which was one of the most meaningful efforts to stop climate change yet--all to please the corporate donors who make up his base. The generations that'll come after us deserve better. We need a Green New Deal now.
**[I need to know there are 1,500 people by midnight tomorrow who share my fight for and commitment to protecting our future with a Green New Deal. Add your name now.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0f3/3529210483/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3OTYtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/GND-petition?source=jtk2796-ja-gfp-nd")**
I'll leave you with this: one of my favorite pictures with my boys, from almost 10 years ago. When I think about why I'm fighting for our planet, I think about our time spent camping, walking in the woods and breathing in fresh air. I'll fight with everything I have to make sure my kids--and their kids--can share these moments, too. And we will win.
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0f3/3529210483/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3OTYtamEtZ2ZwLW5kIn0=/ "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/GND-petition?source=jtk2796-ja-gfp-nd")
Thank you,
Kirsten
[Contribute](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0f2/3529210483/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZ25kIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNzk2LWphLWdmcC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-gnd?refcode=jtk2796-ja-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976a46/2ae112ef/102c79fe/357ad0fd/3529210483/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

| The Supreme Court of the United States (SCOTUS) is returning to the bench after its usual four-week winter recess. The recess was marked by noteworthy “shadow docket” actions on the death penalty, abortion rights, and other matters that offered more news than a usual February. SCOTUS will hear oral arguments for a total of [6 cases](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=WqnSJN-UqkPJD0rrvzw7zpfxwH6pCVCaFEa30IBMq_en40Jb_9S1JInHF1Q6NwTorTfic_mTVgAAUFjxkodl7NdTSCI-odFrmggSMT4mDt3eIk-1FZX2sBIaAHkE1TWsNdkge7A5-68cakoiiwnZnQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190222com01&n=2) this session. Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, who missed all 11 arguments of the January sitting because of her recuperation from lung surgery, is back on the bench hearing arguments this week.
# **PRAYER ALERT**
Please pray for The American Legion v. American Humanist Association Case. The decision on this case will determine more than whether crosses can remain on public property. The case will set a significant precedent for religious freedom as it relates to interpreting the Establishment Clause found in the First Amendment of the Constitution. Pray for First Liberty’s attorneys to have wisdom as they argue this case before the Supreme Court.
# **SUPREME COURT CASE UPDATE FOR FEBRUARY**
Below are three cases worth highlighting for which SCOTUS will hear oral arguments.
## **Case 1: The American Legion v. American Humanist Association**
In Bladensburg Maryland, the American Legion Veteran Organization erected the Bladensburg WWI Veterans Memorial in 1925. The memorial is referred to as the “Peace Cross,” and it honors 49 men from Bladensburg who gave their lives in WWI. It has stood for more than 90 years. In 2014, the American Humanist Association filed a lawsuit claiming the cross-shaped memorial was unconstitutional because the public ownership and maintenance of the memorial violated the Establishment Clause in the First Amendment of the Constitution, which states, “Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion.” [First Liberty](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=9AOqGvHDl3ctglrEUlhy-YxVKicwlzh-U9h70PyyVCd49nScgr3lFQLBbOYw37iS&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190222com01&n=3), a law firm that specializes in religious liberty cases, intervened in the lawsuit on behalf of The American Legion to defend the Bladensburg Memorial Cross. The Fourth Circuit Court of Appeals ruled against the Memorial, and now the case is before the Supreme Court. A recent survey conducted by George Barna found that an overwhelming number of Americans, 84%, believe the American Humanists should leave the memorial alone. Only 2% of Americans support tearing down the Memorial. Kelly Shackelford, President and CEO of First Liberty said, “If this gravestone is bulldozed to the ground, it’s only a matter of time before the wrecking ball turns on Arlington National Cemetery and the hundreds of memorials like this one across the country.” **_The central questions in this case_ _:_**[Is a 93-year-old memorial unconstitutional because it is shaped like a cross, and does the public maintenance of a cross-shaped memorial violate the Establishment Clause in the First Amendment?](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=RDRHk6ni7OvEv8Bu9zj6hOmzQDXZ40q6bpBo2moH1BzwGLmPu_FHiK6W2vrF7N13hpctNC2NXUTEox1pMcKygkoDaDBvBo9YDFMRm-gkDzY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190222com01&n=4) Oral arguments for this case will be heard on February 27, 2019.
## **Case 2: Manhattan Community Access Corp. v. Halleck**
Content platform companies should closely watch for the decision on this case, as it could substantially limit their power to control the content on their platforms.
[**Click here to read the rest of My Faith Votes Article on this case**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0q_WroHzJTcvgXvoHMx86HP6IrBcGIWnJNYv4qjKfZIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190222com01&n=5 "Manhattan Community Access
Corp. v. Halleck").
## **Case 3: United States v. Haymond**
Haymond, a repeat offender of possessing child pornography, appealed to the court and argued there was insufficient evidence to prove he had knowingly possessed child pornography and claimed it was a violation of the Constitution to deny him due process.
[**Click here to read the rest of My Faith Votes Article on this case**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0q_WroHzJTcvgXvoHMx86Hi_454E3p0DG7GIAkztdDYg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190222com01&n=6 "United States v. Haymond").

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Important update about NC-09
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Dan McCready has established himself as a man of character and integrity, and he would bring to Congress a sincere desire to serve the people.
| | Peter,

You may have heard the news that broke out of North Carolina yesterday. The 9th Congressional District election--which was mired by GOP candidate Mark Harris' election fraud scandal--is being scrapped, and a special election will be conducted at a later date.

While I'm pleased to see some form of justice handed out over this affront to democracy, I'm nevertheless disappointed with the outcome. Dan McCready, the Democratic candidate in that race, ran an honest, tough, and effective campaign that showcased his background as a Marine veteran, successful business owner, and dedicated public servant. And now he has to start all over again.

This is going to be very expensive for Dan, but with our help, he can pull this off. [**Can you join me in contributing whatever you can to his special election fund?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oefoPVZpGHN6hcXakYNcrtN-aRLvFQfsiYkb9RLkqQc=/tWtE8RWJkXQqcJUO8I6ys8MeLFeaut7onZW-VNjBfZY=?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.22_b1_as_all&amount=25)

This is the first time in 40 years that a federal election has been tossed out like this, and for good reason. What we witnessed in North Carolina was a clear violation of voters' rights, and a horrifying example of the win-at-all-costs mentality plaguing our political landscape.

This is why it's so important we [**give Dan McCready our support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oefoPVZpGHN6hcXakYNcrtN-aRLvFQfsiYkb9RLkqQc=/tWtE8RWJkXQqcJUO8I6ys8MeLFeaut7onZW-VNjBfZY=?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.22_b1_as_all&amount=25). He's established himself as a man of character and integrity, and he would bring to Congress a sincere desire to serve the people.

We need as many of those as we can get, so I urge you to [**donate to Dan 's campaign today**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oefoPVZpGHN6hcXakYNcrtN-aRLvFQfsiYkb9RLkqQc=/tWtE8RWJkXQqcJUO8I6ys8MeLFeaut7onZW-VNjBfZY=?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.22_b1_as_all&amount=25), if you can.

Thank you, Peter.

Sincerely,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oefoPVZpGHN6hcXakYNcrtN-aRLvFQfsiYkb9RLkqQc=/tWtE8RWJkXQqcJUO8I6ys8MeLFeaut7onZW-VNjBfZY=?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.22_b1_as_all&amount=25)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/oefoPVZpGHN6hcXakYNcrtN-aRLvFQfsiYkb9RLkqQc=/PpSz8BXDtmcfnsgu0j_6oIy40n1FxtVA1YS62OB1PsA=)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: New Migrant Caravan Forms as Mexican Cities That Border US Keep Swelling with Asylum Seekers
body:
"Yet another caravan of more than 1,000 mostly Central American migrants has crossed Mexico’s southern border, according to officials." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e587b97a39&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **New Migrant Caravan Forms as Mexican Cities That Border US Keep Swelling with Asylum Seekers**

“Yet another caravan of more than 1,000 mostly Central American migrants has crossed Mexico’s southern border, according to officials. They clashed briefly with federal police and immigration agents (INM) but were able to overwhelm the officials and enter illegally,” Griff Jenkins reports for Fox News.

“The new caravan begins the march north toward the United States as border cities like Ciudad Juárez are swelling with migrants already here from previous caravans . . . Such pressures on U.S. border cities like El Paso, Texas, which is across from Ciudad Juárez, are evident in the number of apprehensions for illegal entry, which is up 478 percent this year.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d18f646564&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Vice President Mike Pence visited an economically struggling neighborhood in a northeast section of South Carolina’s capital city Thursday to tout the ‘Opportunity Zones’ program U.S. Sen. Tim Scott [R-SC] championed in Congress,” Jamie Lovegrove reports in _[The Post and Courier](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8de8594efb&e=3ee4985eea)_. Opportunity zones, a key piece of the tax cuts President Trump signed into law in 2017, are helping restore distressed communities nationwide.
---
|
---
| Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump toured a UPS driver training facility in Duluth, Georgia, with Gov. Brian Kemp (R-GA) on Wednesday, detailing the Trump Administration’s focus on workforce development, Kelly Yamanouchi writes in _[The Atlanta Journal-Constitution](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0feb9a7b8&e=3ee4985eea)_. Last year, UPS “signed a pledge in support of President Trump’s workforce development initiative, committing to offer opportunities for career advancement to more than 50,000 employees.”
---
|
---
| In _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59e5001d4b&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) and Rep. Kevin Brady (R-TX) point out that tax refunds are lower today because taxes are lower—keeping more money in Americans’ hands all year long. Democrats were wrong that tax cuts would hurt our economy. Now, they are “peddling the scary elixir that ‘lower tax refunds mean higher taxes.’ Wrong again . . . This claim about refunds, as the Washington Post’s fact checker observed, is ‘nonsensical and misleading.’”
---
|
---
| “President Trump’s speech Monday afternoon in Miami wasn’t just directed at Nicolas Maduro and the socialists of Venezuela — it was also a stark reminder to left-leaning Americans that socialism's days are ‘numbered,’” Lt. Col. Tony Shaffer writes in _[The Detroit News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=de1417ffe4&e=3ee4985eea)_. “As Democrats rally around radical proposals such as ‘Medicare-for-all,’ free college tuition, enormous minimum wage increases, and even guaranteed basic income, it was President Trump’s responsibility to remind us that socialism’s sweeping promises are always empty.”
---
|

This claim about refunds, as the Washington Post’s fact checker observed, is ‘nonsensical and misleading.’” | | “President Trump’s speech Monday afternoon in Miami wasn’t just directed at Nicolas Maduro and the socialists of Venezuela — it was also a stark reminder to left-leaning Americans that socialism's days are ‘numbered,’” Lt. Col. Tony Shaffer writes in . “As Democrats rally around radical proposals such as ‘Medicare-for-all,’ free college tuition, enormous minimum wage increases, and even guaranteed basic income, it was President Trump’s responsibility to remind us that socialism’s sweeping promises are always empty.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Doug's first 2020 opponent has announced his run for the Senate. I need Doug by my side in the Senate to help folks in Alabama, Virginia, and across the country.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

In 2017, we worked so hard together to help get my friend Doug Jones to the Senate. Every day since that incredible election, Doug has shown us why fighting for him was the right thing to do. He's worked tirelessly to represent the people of Alabama who voted him into office, and he's stood with Democrats on critical votes when we needed him most.

**Now, Doug's first 2020 opponent has announced his run for the Senate.** [**Will you step up today and show Doug that you still have his back?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1747/3e0906/7a5a6308/3e37569b/474952721/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-jones-2020?amount=25&refcode=20190221_1_FR_TK_Jones&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+step+up+today+and+show+Doug+tha&utm_campaign=20190221_1_FR_TK_Jones&source=20190221_1_FR_TK_Jones")

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: our tax code should put workers first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
Support a tax code that puts workers first >>
|
---

| | One of the best tools we have to incentivize large businesses and corporations to behave well -- and discourage them from behaving badly -- is our tax code. When President Trump signed his tax bill into law last year, he promised it would help Americans. Either he was lying -- **or he truly doesn't understand how the tax code works.** Trump handed corporations huge tax windfalls. Now, those companies are using that money to maximize their profits and move jobs overseas. Just look at what's happening in Lordstown, where GM is shuttering their plant while potentially getting a tax cut for creating jobs in Mexico. Trump's tax law didn't solve a damn thing -- it exacerbated the problem. We need a tax code that discourages corporations from shipping jobs off our shores. We need a system that prioritizes the wellbeing of workers and their families. [**Join me and support a tax code that puts workers first >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc23/4462dc26/8e66af5a/201edac4/3617371584/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190222pmm") My plan would strike Trump's tax law and replace it with a system that:
* Prioritizes workers and families;
* Incentivizes businesses to invest in good-paying American jobs; and
* Penalizes corporations that refuse to pay workers a living wage.

This is how we put money back in the pockets of workers and their families. A smart tax code that puts workers before corporate profits will help families all across the country. [**If you like this plan, sign on to show your support >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffc23/4462dc26/8e66af5a/201edac4/3617371584/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190222pmm") With gratitude, Sherrod

subject: The Key to More Voting Is….
body:
How do we get more Hoosiers to vote? Yes, we’re still months away from the primary. And yes, we’re even further away from a general election...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-key-to-more-voting-is?e=1acd9bb3d6)
http://indiana.gop/2019springdinner?mc_cid=67d1683853&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

The Key to More Voting Is....

How do we get more Hoosiers to vote?

As I wrote this week in a column in the Indianapolis Business Journal (https://www.ibj.com/articles/72582-kyle-hupfer-to-increase-the-vote-lets-talk-civics?mc_cid=67d1683853&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , civic education can be the difference-maker.

We need to ensure that every student, before he or she enters adulthood and the rigors of daily life, has a basic understanding of our form of government. Why would you watch football or basketball if you didn’t understand the rules of the game?

Likewise, why would you participate in the civic process if you didn’t understand how citizens are the employers—and our representatives merely the employees?

Leaders here in Indiana and across the country have been calling for enhanced civic education.

So, yes, we’re still months away from the primary. And yes, we’re even further away from a general election. But a
s you’re reaching out to voters this year, consider if you’re talking to young people, or people Republicans historically may have overlooked in your community. Are you talking about the importance of their voice in our republic?

Take a little time, and you’ll discover the strength you find...in your leaders, in your government service, and the results at the ballot box.

-Kyle Hupfer
GOVERNOR HOLCOMB'S WEEK THAT WAS

Honoring Leaders & Presidents

When it comes to leading our party and our communities, Governor Eric Holcomb understands that its our local leaders and businesses that are truly leading the charge! That’s why when he was in Kokomo (http://www.kokomotribune.com/news/local_news/gov-holcomb-surprises-cone-palace-owners-sheriff-rogers-with-award/article_2fa54288-320c-11e9-be0e-6bd4b1527169.html?mc_cid=67d1683853&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for the Howard County Republican Party’s Century Club Breakfast, he took the time to recognize three local leaders for their contribution to the community and awarded them with the state’s highest honor, the Sagamore of the Wabash. They are:
* Former Howard County Sheriff Steve Rogers, who just retired after a 48-year career in law enforcement
* Jeff and Lisa Smeltzer, the second-generation owners of the family-owned restaurant the Cone Palace in Kokomo, which serves as a strong pillar in the Howard County community

Oh, and in case you missed it – in honor of Presidents’ Day, Governor Holcomb gave a few tours of his presidential signature collection (did you know he collects presidential signatures?). Check out the video here (https://cbs4indy.com/2019/02/18/gov-holcomb-shows-rare-collection-of-presidential-signatures/?mc_cid=67d1683853&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and read a story and check out a few photos here (https://www.indystar.com/story/news/politics/2019/02/18/gov-holcomb-has-collected-signatures-43-44-presidents/2800374002/?mc_cid=67d1683853&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) . Guess which president’s signature is the only one he’s missing?
http://indiana.gop/2019springdinner?mc_cid=67d1683853&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Vigo, Newton & Shelby Counties Attract Large Crowds

This week, the Vigo, Newton and Shelby County Republican Parties each held successful Lincoln Day Dinners!
* Vigo County brought in John Pence, who is the senior advisor on President Donald J. Trump’s campaign (bottom right)
* Newton County hosted Congressman Jim Baird’s first-ever keynote address at a Lincoln Day Dinner (bottom left).
* Shelby County hosted Congressman Greg Pence’s first keynote remarks at a Lincoln Day dinner as a member of the U.S. House of Representatives (top).

Check out the list above, and make sure you don’t miss your county’s Lincoln Day Dinner!

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Gun safety is too important for these games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
This is not acceptable to our children, who deserve protection.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a3aa/2f5ea88d/784eb79c/2cbd15de/646243507/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/these-are-the-laws-of-washington?utm_source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&utm_campaign=1639-sheriffs&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- The gun safety we all demanded last election is at stake. We must demand action. In November, Washington state voters passed I-1639, the commonsense gun law that took many positive steps to reduce gun violence. But now, some sheriffs have stated that they will willfully refuse to enforce this law. Our sheriffs shouldn't pick and choose which laws to enforce -- ESPECIALLY when it comes to gun safety. This is unacceptable for Washington, this is unacceptable for the law, and this is unacceptable for me. Our children deserve protection. We can't allow sheriffs to refuse to keep our communities safe. [**If you agree that law enforcement MUST enforce I-1639 and keep our communities safe, add your name to my petition today.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a3aa/2f5ea88d/784eb79c/2cbd15de/646243507/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/these-are-the-laws-of-washington?utm_source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&utm_campaign=1639-sheriffs&utm_medium=ema") Last week, we were reminded of just how important it is to keep our residents safe, as we mourned the first anniversary of the Parkland shooting. It is irresponsible for these sheriffs to refuse to enforce the voter-approved laws of Washington state and risk a tragedy like this happening again. This law _will_ be enforced. Mark my words. There is too great a cost to ignore our duty to protect our children. [**Join me in calling on law enforcement to enforce the crucial I-1639 bill.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a3aa/2f5ea88d/784eb79c/2cbd15de/646243507/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/these-are-the-laws-of-washington?utm_source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&utm_campaign=1639-sheriffs&utm_medium=ema") No matter what, we must do what we need to keep our communities safe. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a3aa/2f5ea88d/784eb79c/2cbd15de/646243507/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/these-are-the-laws-of-washington?utm_source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&source=ema_2019-02-22_1639-sheriffs&utm_campaign=1639-sheriffs&utm_medium=ema")
